query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dailyPlans WHERE planDate = '2026-05-18') AS mon_may_18_plan, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scheduleBlocks sb JOIN dailyPlans dp ON sb.planId = dp.id WHERE dp.planDate = '2026-05-18') AS mon_may_18_blocks, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scheduleBlocks sb JOIN dailyPlans dp ON sb.planId = dp.id WHERE dp.planDate = '2026-05-19') AS tue_may_19_blocks, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drivePush WHERE status = 'pending') AS pending_pushes, (SELECT MAX(createdAt) FROM drivePush WHERE status = 'pushed') AS last_pushed_at;
